subject: Yemen!!!
body:
Dear Jeffrey
This picture is of a daily routine inspection of civilians by Yemeni police for terrorists wearing explosive belts.
Notice that the civilian is carrying a kalashinkov or an attack Riffe which is absolutely  legitimate and normal  to carry and walk with in the streets without a permit as weapons are considered as part of the  national Yemeni attire !!!





Sent from my iPhone
